reason: Check that create writes remain within the single D1 baseline, status/audit constraints, canonical-tag alias behavior, and batch transaction expectations.
Check 401/400/500 JSON behavior and ensure the browser fetch caller never receives an HTML redirect from the admin API.
Check responsive admin navigation, form semantics, TagInput hidden-field behavior, Bits UI reuse, focus states, and no prohibited styling/tooling.
Check that tags, publication status, audit metadata, API response data, and redirect behavior survive every layer boundary.
Check for duplicated event-form markup, validation, option catalogues, or tag serialization after extraction.
